description: global.css consumes the font CSS variables emitted by astro.config.mjs: body { font-family: var(--font-plex-sans) } and --font-mono begins with var(--font-plex-mono). Those variables are produced by the IBM Plex Sans and IBM Plex Mono fonts configured under fonts in astro.config.mjs (cssVariable --font-plex-sans / --font-plex-mono). Renaming or removing a configured font/cssVariable silently drops the font and falls back to the generic family; the var() references here must stay in sync.
